title: genesis-scope: Semantic Coordination System for Human-LLM Collaboration
description: genesis-scope (GenesisAeon Package 39) implements the semantic coordinate system that structures human-LLM collaboration. It models semantic anchors (Sigillin), a drift relaxation model dD/dt = -kappa*(D - D*), the (tau_A, tau_H, Sigma) coordination space, the collaboration CREP tensor Gamma_collab = (C*R*E*P)^(1/4), Q4 4-bit collaboration states, and session tracking against the v_RIG threshold (Package 31).
